channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Current price of oil as of July 10, 2026
item.description: When oil prices change, it affects your energy costs and even the price of everyday items. Here is why.

item.title: Strait jacket: Wall Street is worried President Trump has no good options for ending the war with Iran
item.description: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.

item.title: 40% of Americans did not read a book last year. These 3 are worth the exception
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: U.S. VCs deployed a record $412.7 billion in first half of 2026, but little reaches startups
item.description: U.S. venture capital firms invested $412.7 billion in the first half of 2026, a record surpassing the entire 2025 total by 30%, per PitchBook.
